spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates smooth CSS zoom transition in layout flow on card hover/focus.

interactive.rationale: Allows direct interaction with a grid of cards via hover and focus states.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the core milestone description showing layout reflow.

edge_cases.rationale: The live capability probe panel is completely generic and checks for unrelated APIs instead of animatable zoom.

references.rationale: Correctly links to the ChromeStatus entry and MDN documentation.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the global design system and WCAG rules.

openQuestions.title: Fix copy-pasted capability probe in Zoom Gallery
openQuestions.detail: The live probe panel currently checks for unrelated APIs like navigator.gpu and customElements instead of probing for animatable zoom support. Replace it with a relevant probe using CSS.supports('transition-property', 'zoom') or a live transition style property check.

summary: Demonstrates basic zoom hover reflow but includes a copied capability probe panel checking for unrelated browser features.
